Slender shoulders bear a few vials filled with colorful liquids and lithe arms expertly wield a primitive stone-tipped spear, the ominously sharpened head pointed directly at you. Black hair flows freely over her spry human-half, gently mingling with her equally dark fur all the way down to her plump, hand-filling butt.
